name: DB Table Source
shortDescription: Fetch a table from the CBR data
description: Authenticates as the user who ran the pipeline using the API key injected by Argo (no credentials stored in the pipeline), downloads a table from your approved access request using the cbr-data-access SDK, and stores the result in MinIO as Parquet for downstream nodes.

name.label: Node Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

table_name.label: Table Name
table_name.description: Bare table name to download from your approved access request (e.g. person, measurement).

view_id.label: View ID
view_id.description: Access request UUID to use (e.g. a7f4d49a-ad3a-4a39-bc04-f97ce4d7c0f4). Required when you have more than one approved access request.

row_limit.label: Row Limit
row_limit.description: Maximum number of rows to fetch (adds a SQL LIMIT). Choose "No limit" to fetch the full table.

outputDescription: Data fetched from the database table or query as Parquet
